meaning: n.希腊语的第十九个字母
examples: In his animal study, he found even small clumps of the tau protein may disrupt memory.
Beta (in the form of beta-amyloid plaques) and tau (in the form of tau tangles) are the physical manifestations of Alzheimer's.
This is the first elementary particle to be discovered since the tau neutrino in 2001.
Blake learned about tau when I interviewed him for Pi Day this year.
